---
title: "Nvidia boost performance"
date: 2009-01-19
forum: General Help
---

### Post by sv1cdn on 2009-01-19
Dear all.
Anybody knows the best configuration to use on xorg.conf with an Nvidia 6200 AGP graphics card? Ubuntu is 8.10 and Nvidia driver is version 177.
FYI below is my current xorg.conf

> 

# xorg.conf (X.Org X Window System server configuration file)
#
# This file was generated by failsafeDexconf, using
# values from the debconf database and some overrides to use vesa mode.
#
# You should use dexconf or another such tool for creating a "real" xorg.conf
# For example:
#   sudo dpkg-reconfigure -phigh xserver-xorg
# commented out by update-manager, HAL is now used
#Section "InputDevice"
#	Identifier	"Generic Keyboard"
#	Driver		"kbd"
#	Option		"XkbRules"	"xorg"
#	Option		"XkbModel"	"pc105"
#	Option		"XkbLayout"	"us"
#EndSection
# commented out by update-manager, HAL is now used
#Section "InputDevice"
#	Identifier	"Configured Mouse"
#	Driver		"mouse"
#EndSection
#Section "Device"
#	Identifier	"device1"
#	Boardname	"vesa"
#	Busid		"PCI:1:0:0"
#	Driver		"nv"
#	Screen	1
#EndSection
#Section "Screen"
#	Identifier "screen1"
#	Device     "device1"
#	Monitor    "monitor1"
#	DefaultDepth     24
#EndSection

Section "Monitor"
	Identifier   "Configured Monitor"
	VendorName   "Generic LCD Display"
	ModelName    "LCD Panel 1280x1024"
	HorizSync    31.5 - 64.0
	VertRefresh  56.0 - 65.0
	Gamma        1
	ModeLine     "640x480@60" 25.2 640 656 752 800 480 490 492 525 -hsync -vsync
	ModeLine     "800x600@56" 36.0 800 824 896 1024 600 601 603 625 +hsync +vsync
	ModeLine     "800x600@60" 40.0 800 840 968 1056 600 601 605 628 +hsync +vsync
	ModeLine     "1024x768@60" 65.0 1024 1048 1184 1344 768 771 777 806 -hsync -vsync
	ModeLine     "1280x960@60" 102.1 1280 1360 1496 1712 960 961 964 994 -hsync +vsync
	ModeLine     "1280x1024@60" 108.0 1280 1328 1440 1688 1024 1025 1028 1066 +hsync +vsync
EndSection

Section "Monitor"
	Identifier   "monitor1"
	Gamma        1
EndSection

Section "Screen"
	Identifier "Default Screen"
	Device     "Configured Video Device"
	Monitor    "Configured Monitor"
	DefaultDepth	24
	SubSection "Display"
		Virtual   1280 1024
		Depth     24
		Modes    "1280x1024@60"
	EndSubSection
EndSection

Section "Module"
	Load  "glx"
	Load  "v4l"
EndSection

Section "ServerLayout"
	Identifier     "Default Layout"
	Screen      0  "Default Screen" 0 0
EndSection

Section "Device"
	Identifier  "Configured Video Device"
	BoardName   "vesa"
	Option	    "UseFastTLS" "1"
	BusID       "PCI:1:0:0"
	Driver	"nvidia"
	Option	"NoLogo"	"True"
	Option  "NvAGP"         "1"
EndSection



Always take good care.

---

### Post by sv1cdn on 2009-01-25
Installed N Vidia X server settings and calling it from System>Administration changed OpenGL settings to High performance.

---
